text: Region: Massaaoudiye. Date: 2026-05-24. Predicted flood risk: Medium. Risk score: 0.5. Main drivers: Moderate recent rainfall; High humidity; Soil moisture included; River flow is 0.94x its normal level. 7-day rainfall is 30.24 mm, humidity is 82.0%, temperature is 20.0 C, wind speed is 10.0 m/s. Recommended action: Monitor low-lying roads and keep drainage crews on standby.

Region: Barcha. Date: 2026-05-24. Predicted flood risk: High. Risk score: 0.84. Main drivers: Heavy rain over the last 7 days; High humidity; Soil moisture included; River flow is 1.53x its normal level. 7-day rainfall is 70.56 mm, humidity is 91.0%, temperature is 19.0 C, wind speed is 13.0 m/s.
